title: Learning dexterity
summary: We’ve trained a human-like robot hand to manipulate physical objects with unprecedented dexterity.
summaryZh: 我们训练了一个类似人类的机器人手，以前所未有的灵活性操纵物体。
highlights: We’ve trained a human-like robot hand to manipulate physical objects with unprecedented dexterity.
highlightsZh: 我们训练了一个类似人类的机器人手，以前所未有的灵活性操纵物体。

title: OpenAI Scholars 2018: Meet our Scholars
summary: Our first class of OpenAI Scholars is underway, and you can now follow along as this group of experienced software developers becomes machine learning practitioners.
summaryZh: 我们的第一批OpenAI学者正在进行中，您现在可以跟随这群经验丰富的软件开发人员成为机器学习从业者。

title: Glow: Better reversible generative models
titleZh: 发光：更好的可逆生成模型
summary: We introduce Glow, a reversible generative model which uses invertible 1x1 convolutions. It extends previous work on reversible generative models and simplifies the architecture. Our model can generate realistic high resolution images, supports efficient sampling, and discovers features that can be used to manipulate a
summaryZh: 我们引入了Glow ，这是一种使用可逆1x1卷积的可逆生成模型。它扩展了以前关于可逆生成模型的工作，并简化了架构。我们的模型可以生成逼真的高分辨率图像，支持高效采样，并发现可用于操纵
highlights: We introduce Glow, a reversible generative model which uses invertible 1x1 convolutions.
It extends previous work on reversible generative models and simplifies the architecture.
highlightsZh: 我们引入了Glow ，这是一种使用可逆1x1卷积的可逆生成模型。它扩展了以前关于可逆生成模型的工作，并简化了架构。我们的模型可以生成逼真的高分辨率图像，支持高效采样，并发现可用于操纵

title: Learning Montezuma’s Revenge from a single demonstration
titleZh: 通过一次演示学习《蒙特祖玛的复仇》
summary: We’ve trained an agent to achieve a high score of 74,500 on Montezuma’s Revenge from a single human demonstration, better than any previously published result. Our algorithm is simple: the agent plays a sequence of games starting from carefully chosen states from the demonstration, and learns from them by optimizing th
summaryZh: 我们已经培训了一名客服代表，通过单人演示，在《Montezuma's Revenge》中获得了74,500分的高分，比之前发布的任何结果都要好。我们的算法很简单：代理从演示中精心选择的状态开始玩一系列游戏，并通过优化
